case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. MELVIN GEOVANNI LINARES RAMIREZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-30-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-30-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. REPRESENTED BY GUADALUPE ACEVEDO LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT MELVIN GEOVANNI LINARES RAMIREZ DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LINARES RAMIREZ, MELVIN GEOVANNI $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LINARES RAMIREZ, MELVIN GEOVANNI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-30-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,807.41 AS TO DEFENDANT LINARES RAMIREZ, MELVIN GEOVANNI
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED JAN-05-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LINARES RAMIREZ, MELVIN GEOVANNI
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-30-2019 - JUDGMENT.
